positions.title: Assistant Manager
description: Contributed to operational excellence across luxury hotels, rooftop restaurants, and large-scale events in Warsaw.
Assisted with team leadership, guest relations, staff coordination, and service delivery at the highest standards.
Supported HR and organizational culture initiatives—teamwork, professionalism, and employee engagement.

positions.title: Hospitality Professional
description: Guest-facing roles at Verte Warsaw, Presidential Hotel, The Westin Warsaw, Raffles Europejski Warsaw, and Varso Tower.
Event and service delivery experience at venues on the Polish coast (Wybrzeże Polskie).
Built communication, adaptability, and leadership skills with international guests and hospitality teams.
